sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100414" key="sunerwthte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνερωτ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n100414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must employ the method of successive questions</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0544.tlg001:251" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">251</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
